name: agent-pipeline-claude
description: Run multi-step Claude Code work without drift. Plugin reads your project's spec and drafts a per-run scope contract; you APPROVE in chat. Then research → plan → execute → verify → critique runs end-to-end with three human gates, an opt-in real-time judge, and machine-checkable auto-promote. One namespaced skill (/agent-pipeline-claude:run); no YAML to hand-author.
